description: CompositionBlack round neck tunic made of 100% viscose, has a ruched shoulder detail and straps at the shoulder to knotFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironEvery woman needs a stylish tunic in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this tunic we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with w's innovative styling. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Model statisticsThe product is a size 8 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
